name: Spotify, Top
description: Your top tracks, artists, or albums on Spotify for a chosen time window (last four weeks, six months, or all time). Cover art hero plus a smaller grid of runners-up. Requires Spotify Core 0.2.0+; existing installs need to hit Reconnect once to grant the user-top-read scope. 'Albums' is derived from top tracks (Spotify has no top-albums endpoint).

cell_options.name: max_items
cell_options.label: Items to show (1-10, hero counts as one)

cell_options.name: show_hero
cell_options.label: Large hero card for the #1 item
